docs.title: Open Source Software from Bilberry Software Ltd
docs.text:
We use and support a range of Free and Open Source Software (FOSS) at Bilberry Software Ltd.

This website showcases the ones we sponsor and maintain, and provides their latest documentation websites.

docs.title: OSS Projects from Bilberry Software Ltd
docs.text: Logo Project Kod - Kubernetes Offline Deployment tool. Enables you to package Helm Charts and Helmfiles and their containers and deploy them to an air-gapped private container/OCI artifact registry and Kubernets cluster
